{{Infobox group
| name = Solstice
| introduced = The Captain
}}

''See also: [[Solstice Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Solstice is a powerful and elusive organization that exerts control over the [[Galactic Union]]. Described as a group of [[World Spirits]], it possesses an information network that is significantly larger than any major corporation. While some believe it to be a secret society responsible for orchestrating widespread chaos and engineering conflicts—such as the destruction of ships to force combat or manipulating events to allow the [[Galactic Union]] to appear heroic—others suggest that its existence is more of a shared perception than a formal entity. The organization has been accused of stripping freedom from citizens across numerous worlds, though it is composed of people rather than being a hive-mind. It is considered an extremely difficult enemy to identify or confront due to its formless nature.}}

== The Captain ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Solstice]] is an organization mentioned by [[Omega]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c41">''The Captain'', chapter 41</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Solstice]] is a secret organization that controls the [[Galactic Union]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c48">''The Captain'', chapter 48</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== The Engineer ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|Solstice is an organization that once stood against [[Starhammer]] during his era of conquest. The group maintains a massive information network that far exceeds the scale of any existing corporations. By acting as a shadow power, they effectively puppeteer the [[Galactic Union]]. In an effort to force a confrontation, Solstice even resorted to destroying their own ships. Currently, the entity remains a primary target for [[Omega]], who seeks to defeat them.}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">5</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Solstice]] is an entity that [[Omega]] wants to defeat.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c5">''The Engineer'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Solstice]] was one of the groups [[Starhammer]] fought during his conquest.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c7">''The Engineer'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Solstice]] has an information network that dwarfs any corporations.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c33">''The Engineer'', chapter 33</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Solstice]] is an organization that puppeteers the [[Galactic Union]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c34">''The Engineer'', chapter 34</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Solstice]] blew up their own ships to force a fight.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c36">''The Engineer'', chapter 36</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== The Knight ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Solstice is a formless, specter-like enemy known for stealing the freedom of average citizens across hundreds of different planets. This entity is identified as a target by [[Omega]] and may have been attempting to ensnare the speaker within a web. While information gathered aboard the ship might be relayed back to Solstice, the name also serves as a location where [[Benri]] receives a welcome.}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">6</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Solstice]] stole freedom from average citizens across hundreds of planets.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c15">''The Knight'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Solstice]] may have been trying to catch the speaker in a web.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c19">''The Knight'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Information learned on the ship might be sent back to [[Solstice]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c22">''The Knight'', chapter 22</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Solstice]] is a target mentioned by [[Omega]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c22" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Solstice]] is an enemy described as a specter with no form.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c45">''The Knight'', chapter 45</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Solstice]] is a location where [[Benri]] is being welcomed.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c45" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== The Pilot ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Solstice is a mysterious shadow organization rooted in the [[Galactic Union]] that operates through a high command of [[World Spirits]] who have turned against their mortal population. This entity maintains members everywhere, possessing the power to hire off-the-books crews, order [[Union]] fleets without repercussions, and use human shields or proton bombs to achieve its ends. While the group has functioned as a former employer for [[Omega]] and maintains various unbreakable contracts, they are also recognized as a real threat to [[Galactic Union]] citizens with the ultimate goal of taking over the galaxy. Despite being tracked to the [[Zykaros system]] and having their location identified, Solstice continues to rule from the shadows, even after betraying [[Benri Vallenar]].}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">61</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Solstice]] is a location that requires someone from [[Planetary Security]] to operate out of [[Fathom]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c2">''The Pilot'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|A huge man intended to meet [[Solstice]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c2" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Solstice]] is a group willing to sacrifice their own men and use proton bombs.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c4">''The Pilot'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Solstice]] is a mysterious shadow organization.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c5">''The Pilot'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Solstice]] has members everywhere.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c5" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Solstice]] can hire entire crews for projects off the books.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c5" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Solstice]] can order [[Union]] fleets without repercussions.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c5" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Solstice]] is a location from which a console was stolen.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c7">''The Pilot'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The crew is going up against [[Solstice]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c8">''The Pilot'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Solstice]] is an individual with a scheduled appointment.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c9">''The Pilot'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Solstice]] is an entity that might use sources to infiltrate ships.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c9" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Solstice]] is an entity or person that the [[Vallenar Corporation]] may want to show their power to.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c10">''The Pilot'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Sola]] asks what [[Solstice]] wants in the [[Dornoth system]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c10" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Solstice]] is a name or entity that analysts are looking for signs of.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c11">''The Pilot'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Solstice]] is rooted in the [[Galactic Union]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c11" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Solstice]] sent [[Aila]]'s father.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c14">''The Pilot'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Solstice]] left tracks in the snow.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c15">''The Pilot'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Solstice]] is an organization that has a representative known as the [[Voice of Solstice]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c16">''The Pilot'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Solstice]] prevented [[The Last Horizon]] from following [[Benri]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c18">''The Pilot'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Solstice]] is a group or entity in custody.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c18" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Solstice]] is an enemy that [[Omega]] holds a bleak hatred for.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c18" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Shyrax has a contract with [[Solstice]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c19">''The Pilot'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Zenith Processor]] and [[Solstice]] may use contracts that cannot be broken.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c19" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Shyrax fulfilled her side of a bargain with [[Solstice]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c21">''The Pilot'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Solstice]] has resources to contact [[Benri]] directly.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c22">''The Pilot'', chapter 22</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Solstice]] has a representative.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c22" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Solstice]] is a former employer of [[Omega]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c24">''The Pilot'', chapter 24</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Solstice]] is keeping information under control.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c24" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The contract requires the trade of a data core to [[Solstice]] in exchange for hostages.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c25">''The Pilot'', chapter 25</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Solstice]] is a tool or power the narrator can use, but cannot keep up indefinitely.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c26">''The Pilot'', chapter 26</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The narrator wants to keep the data core out of [[Solstice]]'s hands.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c28">''The Pilot'', chapter 28</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Crossing [[Solstice]] has severe consequences.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c28" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Solstice]] is a group that includes [[Aila]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c29">''The Pilot'', chapter 29</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The fight against [[Solstice]] is considered a war.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c30">''The Pilot'', chapter 30</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Solstice]] uses human shields to paralyze enemies.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c30" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Solstice]] is a real threat to the citizens of the [[Galactic Union]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c31">''The Pilot'', chapter 31</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Solstice]] is an entity [[Benri Vallenar]] maintains a reputation with.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c32">''The Pilot'', chapter 32</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Solstice]] can wink out of existence.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c32" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Solstice]] is a character who tests [[Sola]]'s family.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c32" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Solstice]] sets traps.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c35">''The Pilot'', chapter 35</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Solstice]] is someone [[Omega]] has been trying to forget.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c36">''The Pilot'', chapter 36</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Solstice]] is an enemy mentioned by [[Omega]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c36" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The leaders of [[Solstice]] were not involved in the store explosion.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c37">''The Pilot'', chapter 37</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Void Prism]] addressed the ladies and gentlemen of [[Solstice]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c38">''The Pilot'', chapter 38</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The plan and design for the victory came from [[Solstice]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c39">''The Pilot'', chapter 39</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Solstice]] controls the exit of the caverns.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c39" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Solstice]] has a high command.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c39" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Solstice]] has betrayed [[Benri]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c39" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Solstice]] is backed by the [[World Spirit of Fathom]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c39" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Solstice]] is a group of [[World Spirits]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c39" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Solstice]] is a group whose location was identified via the [[Zykaros system]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c40">''The Pilot'', chapter 40</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Solstice]] was tracked to [[Zykaros]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c40" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Solstice]] is a person or entity that may be complicit with [[Zykaros]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c40" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Solstice]] is a group that aims to take over the galaxy.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c42">''The Pilot'', chapter 42</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Solstice]] is a person [[Omal]] Escalon addressed.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c43">''The Pilot'', chapter 43</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Solstice]] is an entity or person that people work for.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c44">''The Pilot'', chapter 44</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Solstice]] is a group of [[World Spirits]] that have turned against their mortal population.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c44" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Solstice]] rules from the shadows.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c47">''The Pilot'', chapter 47</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Omega]] regretted never being able to kill [[Solstice]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c47" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Solstice]] was the subject of a request by [[Omega]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c48">''The Pilot'', chapter 48</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The narrator cursed [[Solstice]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c49">''The Pilot'', chapter 49</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|“Solstice blew up their own ships. They’re making sure we have to fight.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c36" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|“I was here to meet Solstice, not a bunch of office workers.”<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c2" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|“We’re finally going up against Solstice.”<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c8" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|“We’re going after your father! Solstice sent him, so he won’t crawl away from me.”<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c14" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|“I am a representative of the highest leadership in our organization. You can consider me the Voice of Solstice.”<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c16" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon groups]]
